name: George Winston
abstract: George Otis Winston III (February 11, 1949 – June 4, 2023) was an American pianist performing contemporary instrumental music. Best known for his solo piano recordings, Winston released his first album in 1972, and came to prominence with his 1980 album Autumn, which was followed in 1982 by Winter into Spring and December.

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Israels
about_quotes.evidence: I used to think that every — you remember in the 70s when George Winston’s music was ubiquitous? ... I’d go into a restaurant and they’d have this Chinese water torture drip of sound of George Winston playing
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Israels interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 11, 2021
